title: Noor's More Ores.
description: It adds many ores and gems.It adds material like steel.
body:
Below is a **long-form ~2000-word project description** suitable for a full Modrinth / CurseForge page, GitHub README, or documentation site. It goes deep into *what the mod adds*, *why players should care*, and *important technical details*, while staying readable and vanilla-friendly.

---

# Noor’s More Ores

**Noor’s More Ores** is a vanilla-plus Minecraft mod that expands the underground experience by adding a wide selection of new, naturally generating ores. The purpose of the mod is simple: make mining, exploration, and progression more interesting without changing how Minecraft fundamentally works. Instead of introducing complex machines, new dimensions, or unfamiliar systems, this mod builds directly on existing vanilla mechanics, ensuring that everything feels familiar, intuitive, and balanced.It is a client-side mod.

Mining has always been one of Minecraft’s core gameplay pillars, but over time it can become repetitive once players know exactly what to expect. Noor’s More Ores addresses this by increasing material variety, encouraging exploration, and providing new progression paths through additional tools, weapons, and armor sets. Every ore is designed to fit cleanly into the vanilla progression curve, offering meaningful choices rather than overpowering upgrades.

---

## Core Design Philosophy

The mod follows a **vanilla-plus** design philosophy. This means that everything added could realistically exist in the base game if Mojang chose to expand it. There are no overly complicated mechanics, no intrusive UI changes, and no systems that require external guides to understand.

Each ore:

* Has a clear purpose
* Fits naturally into the world’s generation
* Uses familiar crafting and smelting processes
* Is balanced around existing vanilla materials

The goal is to enhance Minecraft, not replace it.

---

## New Ores and World Generation

Noor’s More Ores introduces multiple new ores that generate naturally throughout the Overworld. These ores appear at different depths and frequencies, encouraging players to explore caves, mine deeper underground, and travel farther from spawn.

The world generation is designed to blend seamlessly with vanilla terrain:

* Ores spawn alongside stone and deepslate layers
* Distribution respects vanilla progression pacing
* Rarity is balanced to prevent resource flooding

You won’t suddenly be overwhelmed with powerful materials early in the game. Instead, each ore rewards players who take risks, explore further, or invest more time into mining.

Because the mod adds new world generation, **new ores will only generate in unexplored chunks**. For the best experience, starting a new world is recommended. Existing worlds will still work, but players will need to travel to new areas to find the added ores.

---

## New Materials and Crafting

Each ore drops a raw material or directly yields an item that can be smelted into an ingot or crafting component. These materials are used in familiar crafting recipes that mirror vanilla design.

The mod adds:

* New ingots and crafting materials
* Smelting recipes using furnaces and blast furnaces
* Vanilla-style crafting recipes for tools and armor

No custom crafting stations or machines are required. If you already know how to play Minecraft, you already know how to use this mod.

---

## Tools, Weapons, and Armor

One of the main reasons to explore new ores is the gear they allow you to craft. Noor’s More Ores adds several new sets of tools, weapons, and armor, each balanced to sit between existing vanilla tiers or slightly expand upon them.

### Tools

New pickaxes, axes, shovels, and hoes offer:

* Different mining speeds
* Varying durability levels
* Logical progression between stone, iron, diamond, and beyond

These tools are designed to feel useful without invalidating vanilla options.

### Weapons

New swords and combat tools provide:

* Slightly different damage values
* Alternative progression paths
* More variety in combat without overpowering PvE or PvP

### Armor

Armor sets are carefully balanced:

* Protection values fit within vanilla expectations
* Durability is tuned for long-term survival use
* No extreme stat inflation

The result is more choice, not forced upgrades.

---

## Progression and Balance

Progression is a major focus of Noor’s More Ores. Every material is placed deliberately within the game’s natural flow. Early-game ores may help smooth progression for new players, while mid- and late-game ores reward dedication and exploration.

Important balance considerations include:

* Vanilla tools and armor remain relevant
* Diamond and Netherite are not made obsolete
* No “overpowered” materials that trivialize survival

Players can choose how they progress. You are never required to use the new ores, but they are always available as optional paths.

---

## Exploration-Driven Gameplay

By adding more ores at different depths and conditions, the mod encourages players to:

* Explore caves instead of strip-mining only
* Travel farther from spawn
* Revisit mining later in the game

Every mining trip has the potential to reveal something new. This makes long-term survival worlds feel fresh even after dozens or hundreds of hours.

---

## Compatibility and Performance

Noor’s More Ores is designed to be **lightweight and performance-friendly**. It does not add heavy systems, background processing, or complex mechanics that impact performance.

Compatibility features:

* Works well alongside most mods
* Safe for modpacks
* No required dependencies unless stated on the project page

Because it focuses solely on ores and gear, it integrates cleanly into a wide variety of playstyles and modded environments.

---

## Ease of Use

The mod is intentionally beginner-friendly:

* No configuration required
* No custom UI or learning curve
* Uses familiar vanilla mechanics

Install the mod, start a world, and play.
---

## Important Information Before Downloading

Before installing Noor’s More Ores, players should know:

* The mod adds **world generation**
* New ores only generate in unexplored chunks
* A new world is recommended for best results
* The mod focuses only on ores, materials, and gear
* No machines, mobs, or dimensions are added

The mod can be safely removed, but any items already obtained will remain in the world.

---

## Future Plans

Noor’s More Ores is designed with future expansion in mind. Potential updates may include:

* Additional ores
* Further balancing and refinement
* Compatibility improvements

Feedback from players helps guide development.

---

## Who This Mod Is For

This mod is perfect for:

* Players who enjoy mining and crafting
* Vanilla-plus modpack users
* Survival-focused players
* Anyone who wants more depth without complexity

If you love Minecraft’s core gameplay and want to expand it in a natural, balanced way, **Noor’s More Ores** is made for you.

---

If you want, I can also:

* Rewrite this to match **CurseForge tone**
* Shorten it for **Modrinth**
* Customize it to list **specific ores**
* Add **technical version info**

Just tell me 👍
